sanity_suggestions: All current sanity checks passed within tolerance.

Low-q extraction looks unstable: inspect the Guinier window, reduce smearing, and keep enough low-q points below qRg about 1. | High-q Porod extraction looks unstable: extend q_max, reduce smearing, and check whether the fitted unified model is capturing the Porod tail. | Invariant-based extraction is drifting: prefer the unified-fit analytic Q/lc path, extend the measured q-range, and inspect any residual tail-correction dependence. | PDI-based recovery is drifting: inspect the consistency of G, Rg, and B extraction against the simulated curve and compare unified-fit versus hybrid estimates. | Recovered mean size is drifting: inspect moment-to-size conversion and the chosen distribution family.
